title: Last Tour Home
overview: When war veteran Tyler takes a ranch job to escape his past, he finds uneasy peace in the company of an older vet and his granddaughter. But when a grieving neighbor begins to suspect Tyler knows something about his sister’s unsolved death, tensions rise and secrets threaten to surface. Last Tour Home is a gripping modern Western about the cost of loyalty, the weight of memory, and the danger of long-buried truths.
